heading: Absence of Director
label: 279 Absence of Director
text: In the case of the absence of the Director of the National Institute of Standards and Technology the Secretary of Commerce may designate some officer of said Institute to perform the duties of the director during his absence.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the National Institute of Standards and Technology Act which comprises this chapter.
Amendments1988— substituted “National Institute of Standards and Technology” for “Bureau of Standards” and “Institute” for “bureau”.Pub. L. 100–418
Change of NameAct , substituted “Secretary of Commerce” for “Secretary of Commerce and Labor”.Mar. 4, 1913
amendments: Amendments1988— substituted “National Institute of Standards and Technology” for “Bureau of Standards” and “Institute” for “bureau”.Pub. L. 100–418
